name: hermes-ios-panel
description: Cross-platform iPhone side-panel simulator shell for Codex with Safari proxy, scenario recording, replay, UI hierarchy snapshots, logs, and optional real-iOS driver handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Run an iPhone-style side panel with scenario replay.
interface.longDescription: Portable Node.js web-shell driver for macOS, Linux, and Windows. Provides an iPhone-style Codex side panel, Safari-like app shell, external-site proxy, Google Search fallback, scenario recorder/replayer, DOM hierarchy snapshots, console/network event capture, and bundle export. Includes an optional XcodeBuildMCP config for real iOS Simulator work on macOS.
defaultPrompt: Record and replay this UI bug.
